title: nextflow-icescreen pipeline parameters
description: Nextflow pipeline for ICEscreen: detection and annotation of ICEs and IMEs in Bacillota genomes

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Path to comma-separated file containing information about the samples in the experiment.

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved.

icescreen_options.title: ICEscreen options
icescreen_options.description: Parameters for the ICEscreen detection pipeline.

codon_table.description: Genetic code table for CDS translation.

icescreen_db.description: Path to pre-indexed ICEscreen databases. If null, uses databases bundled in the container.

blast_options.title: BLAST options
blast_options.description: Parameters for BLASTP signature protein searches.

blastp_max_target_seqs.description: Maximum number of target sequences per BLASTP query.

min_cds_between_segments.description: Minimum number of CDS between mobile element segments.

max_cds_for_ime_size.description: Maximum number of CDS for IME size classification.

generic_options.title: Generic options
generic_options.description: Less common options for the pipeline.

publish_dir_mode.description: Method used to save pipeline results to output directory.

monochrome_logs.description: Do not use coloured log outputs.
